ex_breathing.text: Core breaths. Inhale wide, then exhale and gently draw your belly toward your spine.

ex_catcow.text: Cat–cow. Round and arch slowly, following your breath.

ex_march.text: Standing marches. Lift each knee with control. Stay tall and easy.

ex_pelvictilt.text: Pelvic tilts. Tip your pelvis, flattening your low back, then release.

ex_glutebridge.text: Glute bridges. Press through your heels, lift the hips, squeeze, lower slowly.

ex_bridgemarch.text: Bridge marches. Hold the bridge tall and lift one foot, then the other.

ex_birddog.text: Bird dog. Reach opposite arm and leg long. Keep your hips level.

ex_glutekick.text: Glute kickbacks. On all fours, press one heel toward the ceiling.

ex_clamshell.text: Clamshells. Side-lying, open the top knee like a clam. Keep feet together.

ex_sideleg.text: Side leg lifts. Lift the top leg with control, then lower without dropping.

ex_wallpush.text: Wall push-ups. Hands on the wall, bend the elbows, press back tall.

ex_kneepush.text: Knee push-ups. From your knees, lower with control and press up.

ex_squat.text: Bodyweight squats. Sit back like reaching for a chair. Stand tall and breathe out.

ex_supportsquat.text: Supported squats. Hold a counter for balance and sit back gently.

ex_reverselunge.text: Reverse lunges. Step back and lower, then drive through the front heel.

ex_stepback.text: Step-back reach. Step back into a gentle lunge and reach tall.

ex_deadbug.text: Dead bug. Lower opposite arm and leg slowly. Keep your back quiet.

ex_calfraise.text: Calf raises. Rise onto your toes, pause, lower slowly.

ex_standoblique.text: Standing side reach. Reach overhead and bend gently to the side.

ex_forearmhold.text: Forearm hold. Hold a steady line from your knees. Breathe — don't bear down.

ex_kneehug.text: Knee hugs. Draw one knee toward your chest and soften.

ex_childpose.text: Child's pose. Sink your hips back and let everything settle.

ex_splitsquat.text: Split squats. Front foot forward, back knee dips toward the floor. Drive up through the front heel.

ex_pushup.text: Full push-ups. On your toes now. Lower with control and press the floor away. Drop to knees anytime.

ex_singlebridge.text: Single-leg bridges. One foot planted, the other leg long. Lift the hips level and lower slow.

ex_plankfull.text: Forearm plank. Full plank on your toes — long line from head to heels, ribs down, keep breathing.

ex_squatjump.text: Squat jumps. Sit back, then spring up and land soft and quiet through the whole foot.

ex_highknees.text: High-knee jog. Light, quick feet in place. Stay tall and land softly.

ex_skater.text: Skater steps. Glide side to side like a skater, soft knees, control the landing.

rest.text: Rest. Take a breath — the next move is coming up.

preview.text: Nice and steady. Let's get a little stronger today.
